text:
It is now:

% swapinfo -h
Device          1K-blocks     Used    Avail Capacity
/dev/zvol/local/SWAP   4194304      12M     4.0G     0%

% swapinfo -m            
Device          1M-blocks     Used    Avail Capacity
/dev/zvol/local/SWAP      4096       11     4084     0%



Should be:

% swapinfo -h
Device                1K-blocks  Used  Avail  Capacity
/dev/zvol/local/SWAP    4194304   12M   4.0G        0%

% swapinfo -m            
Device                1M-blocks  Used  Avail  Capacity
/dev/zvol/local/SWAP       4096    11   4084        0%
